\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4921 introduces Signal Action Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \text{Signal} = \text{SQUID}_{\text{output}} \star \text{EEG}_{\text{phase}} \end{equation}
